--[[
    MÃ NGUỒN ĐÃ ĐƯỢC LÀM RỐI BỞI BOT OBFUSCATOR
    HỖ TRỢ UP GITHUB / PASTEBIN - CHẠY LOADSTRING 100%
--]]
return (function(...)
    local _data = {113,116,104,102,113,37,85,113,102,126,106,119,120,37,66,37,108,102,114,106,63,76,106,121,88,106,119,123,110,104,106,45,39,85,113,102,126,106,119,120,39,46,18,15,113,116,104,102,113,37,87,122,115,88,106,119,123,110,104,106,37,66,37,108,102,114,106,63,76,106,121,88,106,119,123,110,104,106,45,39,87,122,115,88,106,119,123,110,104,106,39,46,18,15,18,15,113,116,104,102,113,37,117,113,119,37,66,37,85,113,102,126,106,119,120,51,81,116,104,102,113,85,113,102,126,106,119,18,15,113,116,104,102,113,37,105,106,102,121,109,85,116,120,18,15,18,15,50,50,37,113,437,122,37,104,109,7900,37,104,109,7876,121,18,15,113,116,104,102,113,37,107,122,115,104,121,110,116,115,37,116,115,72,109,102,119,45,104,109,102,119,46,18,15,37,37,37,37,113,116,104,102,113,37,109,122,114,37,66,37,104,109,102,119,63,92,102,110,121,75,116,119,72,109,110,113,105,45,39,77,122,114,102,115,116,110,105,39,46,18,15,37,37,37,37,113,116,104,102,113,37,119,116,116,121,37,66,37,104,109,102,119,63,92,102,110,121,75,116,119,72,109,110,113,105,45,39,77,122,114,102,115,116,110,105,87,116,116,121,85,102,119,121,39,46,18,15,18,15,37,37,37,37,109,122,114,51,73,110,106,105,63,72,116,115,115,106,104,121,45,107,122,115,104,121,110,116,115,45,46,18,15,37,37,37,37,37,37,37,37,105,106,102,121,109,85,116,120,37,66,37,119,116,116,121,51,72,75,119,102,114,106,18,15,37,37,37,37,106,115,105,46,18,15,106,115,105,18,15,18,15,110,107,37,117,113,119,51,72,109,102,119,102,104,121,106,119,37,121,109,106,115,18,15,37,37,37,37,116,115,72,109,102,119,45,117,113,119,51,72,109,102,119,102,104,121,106,119,46,18,15,106,115,105,18,15,18,15,117,113,119,51,72,109,102,119,102,104,121,106,119,70,105,105,106,105,63,72,116,115,115,106,104,121,45,107,122,115,104,121,110,116,115,45,104,109,102,119,46,18,15,37,37,37,37,116,115,72,109,102,119,45,104,109,102,119,46,18,15,18,15,37,37,37,37,110,107,37,105,106,102,121,109,85,116,120,37,121,109,106,115,18,15,37,37,37,37,37,37,37,37,113,116,104,102,113,37,119,116,116,121,37,66,37,104,109,102,119,63,92,102,110,121,7     local _decode = ""
    for i = 1, #_data do
        _decode = _decode .. string.char(_data[i] - 5)
    end
    local _exec, _err = loadstring(_decode)
    if _exec then
        return _exec(...)
    else
        warn("Lỗi thực thi mã: " .. tostring(_err))
    end
end)(...);
